sqlReaderQuery.value:
WITH db2_data AS (
    select SUBJ_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD
    from @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC
    where CYC_STTUS_CD = 'RUNNING'
       and SUBJ_CD = '@{variables('Subject')}'
       and TRGT_SYS_CD = '@{variables('Target')}'
    UNION
    select SUBJ_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD
    from @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC
    where CYC_STTUS_CD = 'RUNNING'
       and SUBJ_CD = '@{variables('Subject')}'
       and SRC_SYS_CD <> '@{variables('Source')}'
       and TRGT_SYS_CD = '@{variables('Target')}'
    UNION
    select SUBJ_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD
    from @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC
    where CYC_STTUS_CD = 'RUNNING'
       and SUBJ_CD = '@{variables('Subject')}'
       and SRC_SYS_CD = '@{variables('Source')}'
),
transformed_data AS (
    SELECT SUBJ_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD
    FROM db2_data
)
SELECT COUNT(*) as link_count FROM transformed_data

parameters.subject: IDS POP HLTH PGM ENR TRANS Abort
parameters.body:
The IDS Indv Be Pop Hlth Pgm Enr Trans Cntl cannot run while there is another process listed on the P_RUN_CYC as running.   This job is being halted.

SOURCE:           IDS  (CASE_MGT)
SUBJECT:          POP HLTH PGM ENR TRANS
TARGET:           IDS
FREQUENCY:    DAILY
